RULES

* before you follow. (1) I spam my message board, (2) I may (will) curse, (3) I don't have a steady update schedule, but I will post chapters whenever I can!!

* don't follow if. (1) you don't like people that talk a lot, (2) you're against women's/queer rights, (3) and you don't support Palestine!!
